statusLegend.formal-v1: Core battle actions have generated hand-painted pixel-art poses.
statusLegend.formal-v1-safe: Formal pack with safety-margin normalization and edge-artifact cleanup applied.
statusLegend.formal-v1-candidate: Batch-generated formal pack candidate pending in-game visual approval.
statusLegend.formal-v1-candidate-safe: Batch-generated formal pack candidate with safety-margin normalization applied.
statusLegend.mature-candidate-safe: Mature-evolution style candidate with safety-margin normalization applied.
statusLegend.playable-init: Full pack structure exists, but core battle actions are still engineering composites.
statusLegend.needs-evolution: Baby source exists, but rookie and ultimate sources must be produced before pack generation.
